title: Soulection White Label: 023
content:
We are so thrilled for our next release, as we are relaunching our White Label series - which is a 4-6 track EP that spotlights some of our favorite producers from around the world.

Our next White Label Series 23 features a blend of worldwide sounds coming from artist Shaka Lion, from Lisbon, and in collaboration with producer, Singularis, representing Amsterdam. Through the use of samples from Roots, Lovers Rock and Jungle, this 5-track EP highlights the importance of sound system culture.
